Question:
This study will perform a logistic regression using NHANES data from 2005-2008.
Exclude participants whose age at screening is less than 40 years old, and without diabetes when diabetes is defined as one of the following: glycated hemoglobin equal or more than 6.5%, fasting plasma glucose >= 7 mmol/l, oral glucose tolerace test >=11 mmol/l, self reported diagnosis of diabetes, current use of insulin, or current use of diabetes medication.
Exclude participant who are missing four level retinopathy severity, and monocyte count and lymphocyte count, and who did not have retinopathy based on the severity level.
Main variable of interest is (monocyte count/lymphocyte count)*10 and outcome is when four level retinopathy severity is proliferative retinopathy. Covariates are gender, race/Hispanic origin, and age at screening.
Structured Question:
Analysis Type: logistic regression

Dataset: NHANES

Period of Interest: 2005-2008

Inclusion Criteria: None

Exclusion Criteria:
- age at screening < 40
- without diabetes when diabetes is defined as meeting any of the following:
  glycated hemoglobin >= 6.5% OR
  fasting plasma glucose >= 7 mmol/l OR
  oral glucose tolerance test >= 11 mmol/l OR
  self reported diagnosis of diabetes = Yes OR
  current use of insulin = Yes OR
  current use of diabetes medication = Yes
- missing four level retinopathy severity
- missing monocyte count
- missing lymphocyte count
- did not have retinopathy based on four level retinopathy severity

Covariates:
- gender
- race/Hispanic origin
- age at screening

Predictor:
- (monocyte count/lymphocyte count)*10

Outcome:
- four level retinopathy severity = proliferative retinopathy mapped to 1; otherwise 0

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "age at screening", "age at screening"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM nhanes.demo_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening ON temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "glycated hemoglobin (%)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_glycohemoglobin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_glycohemoglobin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glycohemoglobin" AS "glycohemoglobin"
FROM nhanes.ghb_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "glycohemoglobin" AS "glycohemoglobin"
FROM nhanes.ghb_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_glycohemoglobin ON temp_master_glycohemoglobin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "fasting plasma glucose (mmol/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l;

FROM nhanes.glu_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "fasting_glucose_mmol_l" AS "fasting_glucose_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.glu_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l ON temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "oral glucose tolerance test (mmol/l)"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l;

SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l" AS "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.ogtt_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l" AS "two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l"
FROM nhanes.ogtt_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l ON temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "self reported diagnosis of diabetes"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes;

FROM nhanes.diq_d

CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes ON temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "current use of insulin"

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "four level retinopathy severity", "four level retinopathy severity", "four level retinopathy severity"

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye AS

UNION ALL

FROM nhanes.opxret_e;

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "monocyte count", "monocyte count"

SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul" AS "monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul"
FROM nhanes.cbc_d
UNION ALL

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "lymphocyte count", "lymphocyte count"

CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul AS

FROM nhanes.cbc_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul" AS "lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul"

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "gender"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_gender;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_gender AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "gender" AS "gender"
FROM nhanes.demo_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_gender ON temp_master_gender (respondent_sequence_number);

-- TEMP TABLE FOR "race/hispanic origin"
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_master_race_hispanic_origin AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_d
UNION ALL
SELECT respondent_sequence_number, "race_hispanic_origin" AS "race_hispanic_origin"
FROM nhanes.demo_e;
-- Add index for faster joins
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_master_race_hispanic_origin ON temp_master_race_hispanic_origin (respondent_sequence_number);

-- ALL UNIQUE PATIENT IDs
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_all_ids;
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_all_ids AS
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_glycohemoglobin
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_taking_insulin_now
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_gender
UNION
SELECT respondent_sequence_number FROM temp_master_race_hispanic_origin;

-- Add index to the main ID table for the final join
CREATE INDEX idx_temp_all_ids_respondent_sequence_number ON temp_all_ids (respondent_sequence_number);

-- FINAL MASTER TABLE
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS final_master_table;
CREATE TABLE final_master_table AS
SELECT
    a.respondent_sequence_number,
    t0."age_in_years_at_screening",
    t1."glycohemoglobin",
    t2."fasting_glucose_mmol_l",
    t3."two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l",
    t4."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes",
    t5."taking_insulin_now",
    t6."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar",
    t7."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye",
    t8."monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul",
    t9."lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul",
    t10."gender",
    t11."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_all_ids a
LEFT JOIN temp_master_age_in_years_at_screening t0 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t0.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_glycohemoglobin t1 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t1.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_fasting_glucose_mmol_l t2 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t2.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l t3 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t3.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_doctor_told_you_have_diabetes t4 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t4.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_taking_insulin_now t5 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t5.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar t6 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t6.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye t7 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t7.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul t8 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t8.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul t9 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t9.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_gender t10 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t10.respondent_sequence_number 
LEFT JOIN temp_master_race_hispanic_origin t11 ON a.respondent_sequence_number = t11.respondent_sequence_number;

CREATE INDEX idx_final_master_respondent_sequence_number    
    ON final_master_table (respondent_sequence_number);
-- ========== STEP 1: Inclusion ==========
-- No specific inclusion criteria provided; include all patients from final_master_table
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_inclusion AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM final_master_table;

-- ========== STEP 2: Exclusions ==========

-- STEP 2.1: Exclude participants whose age at screening is less than 40 years old
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step1 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_inclusion i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."age_in_years_at_screening" >= 40;

-- STEP 2.2: Exclude participants without diabetes
-- Diabetes is defined as meeting at least one of the following criteria:
-- - glycated hemoglobin >= 6.5%
-- - fasting plasma glucose >= 7 mmol/l
-- - oral glucose tolerance test >= 11 mmol/l
-- - self reported diagnosis of diabetes = 'Yes'
-- - current use of insulin = 'Yes'
-- - current use of diabetes medication = 'Yes'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step2 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step1 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE (f."glycohemoglobin" >= 6.5
   OR f."fasting_glucose_mmol_l" >= 7.0
   OR f."two_hour_glucose_ogtt_mmol_l" >= 11.0
   OR f."doctor_told_you_have_diabetes" = 'Yes'
   OR f."taking_insulin_now" = 'Yes'
   OR f."take_diabetic_pills_to_lower_blood_sugar" = 'Yes');

-- STEP 2.3: Exclude participants with missing four level retinopathy severity
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step3 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step2 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.4: Exclude participants with missing monocyte count
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step4 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step3 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.5: Exclude participants with missing lymphocyte count
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step5 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step4 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul" IS NOT NULL;

-- STEP 2.6: Exclude participants who did not have retinopathy
-- Retinopathy is present when four level retinopathy severity is NOT 'No retinopathy'
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_exclusion_step6 AS
SELECT i."respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step5 i
JOIN final_master_table f ON i."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number"
WHERE f."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" != 'No retinopathy';

-- ========== STEP 3: Cohort ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_cohort AS
SELECT "respondent_sequence_number"
FROM temp_exclusion_step6;

-- ========== STEP 4: Variables ==========

-- 4.1 Gender
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_gender AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."gender"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.2 Race/Hispanic Origin
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_race AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."race_hispanic_origin"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.3 Age at Screening
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_age AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number", f."age_in_years_at_screening"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.4 Monocyte to Lymphocyte Ratio
-- Calculate (monocyte count / lymphocyte count) * 10
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_mlr AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
       (f."monocyte_number_1000_cells_ul" / f."lymphocyte_number_1000_cells_ul") * 10 AS "monocyte_to_lymphocyte_ratio"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- 4.5 Proliferative Retinopathy
-- Outcome = 1 if four level retinopathy severity is 'PR (Proliferative)', otherwise 0
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_outcome AS
SELECT c."respondent_sequence_number",
  CASE
    WHEN f."4_levels_retinopathy_severity_worse_eye" = 'PR (Proliferative)' THEN '1'
    ELSE '0'
  END AS "proliferative_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN final_master_table f ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = f."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 5: Final Table ==========
CREATE TEMP TABLE temp_final_table AS
SELECT 
  c."respondent_sequence_number",
  g."gender",
  r."race_hispanic_origin",
  a."age_in_years_at_screening" AS "age_at_screening",
  m."monocyte_to_lymphocyte_ratio",
  o."proliferative_retinopathy"
FROM temp_cohort c
JOIN temp_gender g ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = g."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_race r ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = r."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_age a ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = a."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_mlr m ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = m."respondent_sequence_number"
JOIN temp_outcome o ON c."respondent_sequence_number" = o."respondent_sequence_number";

-- ========== STEP 6: Final Output ==========
SELECT * FROM temp_final_table;

suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(dplyr))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(broom))
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tibble))

    identifier_vars <- c("respondent_sequence_number")
    outcome_vars <- c("proliferative_retinopathy")
    
    cohort <- df


    outcome_roles <- c()
    outcome_roles["proliferative_retinopathy"] <- "outcome"


    summarize_variable <- function(column, name) {
    n_unique <- length(unique(na.omit(column)))
    na_count <- sum(is.na(column))

    if (name %in% identifier_vars) {
        category <- "identifier"
        summary_info <- paste0("Total rows = ", nrow(cohort))

    } else if (name %in% outcome_vars) {
        # Assign its special role (e.g., "outcome", "mediator")
        category <- ifelse(!is.na(outcome_roles[name]), outcome_roles[name], "outcome")

        # Generate a summary based on its underlying data type
        underlying_type <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (underlying_type == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (underlying_type %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }

    

    } else {
        # This block handles regular predictors
        category <- case_when(
        n_unique == 2                                 ~ "binary",
        is.numeric(column) & n_unique > 2             ~ "numerical",
        is.character(column) | is.factor(column)      ~ "categorical",
        TRUE                                          ~ "other"
        )

        if (category == "numerical") {
        mean_val <- round(mean(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        sd_val   <- round(sd(column, na.rm = TRUE), 3)
        summary_info <- paste0("mean = ", mean_val, ", sd = ", sd_val)
        } else if (category %in% c("categorical", "binary")) {
        tbl <- prop.table(table(column)) * 100
        tbl <- round(tbl, 1)
        summary_info <- paste0(names(tbl), ": ", tbl, "%", collapse = "; ")
        } else {
        summary_info <- NA
        }
    }

    data.frame(
        variable   = name,
        category   = category,
        n_unique   = n_unique,
        na_count   = na_count,
        summary    = summary_info,
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    }

    report <- bind_rows(
    lapply(names(cohort), function(col_name) {
        summarize_variable(cohort[[col_name]], col_name)
    })
    )

    identifier_vars  <- report$variable[report$category == "identifier"]
    cat("Identifier Variables:\n");   print(identifier_vars);   cat("\n")

    

    binary_vars      <- report$variable[report$category == "binary"]
    cat("Binary Variables:\n");       print(binary_vars);       cat("\n")
    print(binary_vars)

    categorical_vars <- report$variable[report$category == "categorical"]
    cat("Categorical Variables:\n");  print(categorical_vars);  cat("\n")
    print(categorical_vars)

    numerical_vars   <- report$variable[report$category == "numerical"]
    cat("Numerical Variables:\n");    print(numerical_vars);    cat("\n")
    print(numerical_vars)

    
    

    outcome_var     <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("outcome")]
    cat("Outcome Variables:\n");      print(outcome_var);      cat("\n")
    

    
        
    
    
    # Identify predictors and factor candidates
    predictor_vars <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary", "numerical")]
    factor_candidates <- report$variable[report$category %in% c("categorical", "binary")]

    # Convert binary/categorical variables to factor if not already
    for (var in factor_candidates) {
    if (!is.factor(df[[var]])) {
        df[[var]] <- as.factor(df[[var]])
    }
    }

    # Initialize reference_levels table
    reference_levels <- tibble(variable = character(), reference_level = character())

    # Clean, trim, and set reference levels for all factor variables
    for (col in factor_candidates) {
    df[[col]] <- factor(trimws(as.character(df[[col]])))
    levels_vec <- levels(df[[col]])

    # Try to find preferred reference
    preferred_order <- c("healthy", "none", "control", "reference", "ref", "normal","Q1", "low", "0", "1")
    matches <- tolower(levels_vec)  # lower case to standardize
    ref_level <- NA  # default

    for (keyword in preferred_order) {
    idx <- which(grepl(keyword, matches, ignore.case = TRUE))
    if (length(idx) > 0) {
        ref_level <- levels_vec[idx[1]]  # pick the first match for that keyword
        break  # stop at the highest-priority match
    }
    }


    # If none found, fall back to most common level
    if (is.na(ref_level)) {
        level_counts <- table(df[[col]])
        ref_level <- names(level_counts)[which.max(level_counts)]
    }

    # Set reference level
    df[[col]] <- relevel(df[[col]], ref = ref_level)

    # Record reference level
    reference_levels <- bind_rows(
        reference_levels,
        tibble(variable = col, reference_level = ref_level)
    )
    }
    
        
    
    x_raw <- df[[outcome_var]]
    x_chr <- trimws(tolower(as.character(x_raw)))

    none_tokens <- c("none", "nan", "na", "", "null", "nil", "missing")
    x_chr[x_chr %in% none_tokens] <- NA_character_

    y <- rep(NA_integer_, length(x_chr))

    y[x_chr %in% c("yes", "y", "true", "t")]  <- 1L
    y[x_chr %in% c("no",  "n", "false", "f")] <- 0L

    x_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x_chr))
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 1] <- 1L
    y[is.na(y) & !is.na(x_num) & x_num == 0] <- 0L

    idx <- is.na(y) & !is.na(x_chr)
    if (any(idx)) {
    vals <- sort(unique(x_chr[idx]))

    if (length(vals) != 2) {
        stop(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' must have exactly 2 non-missing classes after excluding none. Found: %s",
        outcome_var, paste(vals, collapse = ", ")
        ))
    }

    tab <- table(x_chr[idx])
    minority <- names(tab)[which.min(tab)]
    majority <- setdiff(vals, minority)

    cat(sprintf(
        "Outcome '%s' recoding: 1 = %s (minority)  0 = %s (majority)",
        outcome_var, minority, majority
    ))

    y[idx] <- as.integer(x_chr[idx] == minority)
    }

    df[[outcome_var]] <- y

    # Must contain both 0 and 1 somewhere (plus NA allowed)
    u <- sort(unique(df[[outcome_var]][!is.na(df[[outcome_var]])]))
    if (!(length(u) == 2 && all(u == c(0, 1)))) {
    stop(sprintf(
        "After recoding, '%s' must contain both 0 and 1 (plus NA for none). Found: %s",
        outcome_var,
        ifelse(length(u) == 0, "<no non-missing values>", paste(u, collapse = ", "))
    ))
    }

    formula <- as.formula(paste0(outcome_var, " ~ ", paste(predictor_vars, collapse = " + ")))
                
    
        
    
    model <- glm(formula,
                data = df,
                family =  binomial(link = "logit"))
            
    
    result_table <- tidy(model, conf.int = TRUE, exponentiate = TRUE) %>%
        select(term, estimate, p.value, conf.low, conf.high)
